content: Supabase free tier: 500MB DB, 1GB file storage, 5GB bandwidth, 50k MAU, max 2 active projects. CRITICAL: free projects are auto-paused after 1 week of inactivity—completely unavailable until manually unpaused via dashboard. Direct Postgres connections limited to 60 but Supabase JS SDK uses REST/Realtime not direct connections so connection limit does not affect browser PWAs. Pro plan (US5/mo) removes pause policy and adds daily backups.
